User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user in the system (student, supervisor, or admin).

id.description: The unique identifier for the user (Firebase Auth UID).

name.description: The full name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

avatar.description: The URL of the user's avatar image.

department.description: The academic department of the user (optional).

supervisorId.description: The ID of the assigned supervisor for students (optional).

LogEntry.title: LogEntry
LogEntry.description: Represents a log entry created by a student.

id.description: The unique identifier for the log entry.

studentId.description: The ID of the student who created the log.

studentName.description: The name of the student who created the log.

supervisorId.description: The ID of the supervisor assigned to this log.

title.description: The title of the log entry.

status.description: The current status of the log.

observations.description: The observation notes for the session.

challenges.description: The challenges encountered during the session.

category.description: The category of the log entry.

location.description: The location where the session took place.

images.description: A list of URLs for visual documentation.

feedback.description: The feedback provided by the supervisor (optional).

isGradeable.description: Whether this entry contributes to the final grade (optional).

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the log was created.
